echo.name: Echo
lines: Phew... I've confirmed the mic is on, so please stop calling me.
It's depressing to realize I'm the only sane person in this terminal every single day.
Stop wasting time listening to my broadcast and watch your step. Don't get blood on my floors.

friendly.greeting: Well, if it isn't our 'celebrity' Necromancer. I'll broadcast from your perspective as a special favor, so why don't you cause an even bigger scene?
friendly.farewell: Don't die on me. Thanks to you, the ratings... I mean, my boredom is actually fading a bit.

normal.greeting: Attention. Once again, someone is making a scene and wasting the terminal's precious budget. Yes, I'm talking about you.
normal.farewell: Ending broadcast. If you're done, turn off the mic and disappear. I barely have enough time for a smoke break as it is.

hostile.greeting: Look at that Resistance lackey crawling this way. Don't knock on the booth door with those filthy hands; you'll smudge the camera lens.
hostile.farewell: I'll record your screams and use them as a lullaby later. It'll be a masterpiece.

echo.deathLine: This tedious broadcasting... is finally over... Ha...
echo.description: A female announcer holed up in the terminal's broadcast room, spitting out all sorts of venomous remarks. In reality, she might be enjoying this chaos more than anyone.

caron_alive.name: Charon
lines: This is a place where the Reaper's eyes cannot reach.
I shall hide in your shadow and await the moment.
Would you like to reorganize your forces?

friendly.greeting: Welcome, my Lord. The dimensional gate is always open.
friendly.farewell: I shall watch your advance from the shadows.

normal.greeting: The Reaper's aura is close. State your business quickly.

hostile.greeting: Are you going to turn me into a butcher once again?

caron_alive.deathLine: My revenge... has not even begun yet...
caron_alive.description: A former underground administrator who betrayed the Reaper and hid in the protagonist's shadow. He is gentle yet harbors a cold desire for revenge.

caron_dead.name: Guide of the Void

normal.farewell: ......(Only a bizarre breathing sound is heard)......

caron_dead.description: A bizarre familiar crafted from the usurped essence of Charon. Its self-awareness has vanished, and it manipulates void space only in response to your mana.

vesper.name: Vesper the Naive
lines: Those jewels the ladies upstairs wear wouldn't even be worth ten bowls of rice back in our village.
Kael! Don't go too far! Don't step out of my crossbow's range!
This thing called revolution... makes me a lot hungrier than I thought.

friendly.greeting: Hi! Do you have anything to eat? I mean real food, not adrenaline!
friendly.farewell: If I see you next time, give me something delicious! Consider it a reward for me letting you live!

hostile.greeting: Whoa, you really smell like a VIP! Want to see how much this crossbow bolt hurts?
hostile.farewell: Bleh! You missed! Next time, I'm really gonna put a hole in you!

vesper.description: She masks her fear of war with a playful attitude, but her hatred for the upper class is as deep as Kael's.
vesper.deathLine: Ah... I'm so hungry... Is revolution... always this cold...?

sell.quantity_notice: [Notice] Bulk selling is not supported yet. Selling 1 unit only. (Owned: {{total}})

receipt.total: 🧾 Receipt: You earned a total of {{earned}}G from this session.

hostility_limit_reached: 🚫 [PERMANENT HOSTILITY] You have crossed the point of no return with {{faction}}.
🛡️ Members of this faction will now attack you on sight!
